brand-story-img.query:
Jewelry with soul, designed for real life Velmora was born from a simple belief: fine jewelry shouldn't be reserved for special occasions. 
              Our pieces are designed to be worn daily — to elevate your everyday, to mark your milestones, 
              and to become part of your story.
